deploy.startCommand: /bin/bash -lc 'set -e; host="${ODOO_DATABASE_HOST}"; port="${ODOO_DATABASE_PORT:-5432}"; echo "Waiting for Postgres at ${host}:${port}..."; until (echo >"/dev/tcp/${host}/${port}") 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; echo "Postgres is ready"; addons=""; if [[ -n "${ODOO_ADDONS_PATH:-}" ]]; then addons=" --addons-path=${ODOO_ADDONS_PATH}"; fi; exec odoo --http-port="${PORT:-8069}" --init=all --without-demo=True --proxy-mode --db_host="${ODOO_DATABASE_HOST}" --db_port="${ODOO_DATABASE_PORT:-5432}" --db_user="${ODOO_DATABASE_USER}" --db_password="${ODOO_DATABASE_PASSWORD}" --database="${ODOO_DATABASE_NAME}" --smtp="${ODOO_SMTP_HOST}" --smtp-port="${ODOO_SMTP_PORT_NUMBER}" --smtp-user="${ODOO_SMTP_USER}" --smtp-password="${ODOO_SMTP_PASSWORD}" --email-from="${ODOO_EMAIL_FROM}"${addons}'
